if.test: searchValue != null and searchValue != '' and searchTypes != null and searchTypes != ''

where.if: AND (1=0 OR b.author_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR b.bbs_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND b.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND b.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND b.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbs :: selectById */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_bbs b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id WHERE b.bbs_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbs :: selectList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_bbs b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyBbs :: selectPageList */ b.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm FROM sy_bbs b LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = b.site_id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(b.*) /* base.sy :: SyBbs :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_bbs b
